## 📰 Hacker News Highlights / 黑客新闻精选

### Comprehensive C++ Hashmap Benchmarks 2022 - Summary

* Updated benchmark study evaluating 29 different C++ hashmap implementations with 6 hash functions, totaling 174 combinations across 11 benchmarks (1,914 total evaluations)
* Testing infrastructure: Intel i7-8700 at 3200 MHz, isolated core, clang++ 13 with -O3 optimization, multiple runs using median results
* Key benchmark categories include: copy operations, bulk insert/erase of 100M integers, random insert/access patterns with varying distinctness (5%-100%), and random insert/erase with different bit masks
* Hashmaps divided into two types: stable reference implementations (elements stay at same location) vs. open addressing (faster but elements can move)
* Benchmarks test memory overhead, resizing behavior, clear() optimization, removal performance, and equilibrium states with varying map sizes from 8 to 32,800+ entries

### 2022年C++哈希表综合性能测试 - 总结

* 更新的基准测试研究，评估了29种不同的C++哈希表实现，结合6种哈希函数，共174种组合，跨11个基准测试（总计1,914次评估）
* 测试基础设施：Intel i7-8700处理器锁定在3200 MHz，独立核心，clang++ 13编译器使用-O3优化，多次运行取中位数
* 主要基准测试类别包括：复制操作、1亿整数的批量插入/删除、不同唯一性的随机插入/访问模式（5%-100%），以及使用不同位掩码的随机插入/删除
* 哈希表分为两类：稳定引用实现（元素保持在相同位置）与开放寻址（更快但元素可能移动）
* 基准测试检验内存开销、调整大小行为、clear()优化、删除性能，以及从8到32,800+条目不同映射大小的平衡状态

### Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equation: Bridging Classical Control Theory and Modern Machine Learning

* The Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation connects Richard Bellman's 1952 dynamic programming work with 19th-century physics, forming the mathematical foundation for reinforcement learning and optimal control
* The continuous-time HJB equation unifies several modern ML topics: continuous-time RL, stochastic control, diffusion models, and optimal transport
* In deterministic systems, the HJB equation states: -∂ₜV(t,x) = H(t,x,∇ₓV), where the Hamiltonian maximizes immediate reward plus continuation value
* For stochastic diffusions (Itô processes), the HJB becomes: ρV(x) = max_a{r(x,a) + L^a V(x)}, where L^a is the infinitesimal generator incorporating both drift and diffusion terms
* Continuous-time policy iteration alternates between policy evaluation (solving for value under current policy) and policy improvement (greedy action selection via Q-function)
* The approach is model-based, requiring known dynamics f(x,a) and Σ(x,a), using neural networks to represent both value function and policy
* Computing the generator L^a V requires first and second derivatives of the value function, obtained through automatic differentiation

### Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman 方程:强化学习与扩散模型的数学基础

* Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 方程将 Richard Bellman 1952年的动态规划理论与19世纪物理学联系起来,构成了强化学习和最优控制的数学基础
* 连续时间 HJB 方程统一了多个现代机器学习主题:连续时间强化学习、随机控制、扩散模型和最优传输
* 在确定性系统中,HJB 方程表述为:-∂ₜV(t,x) = H(t,x,∇ₓV),其中哈密顿量最大化即时奖励加上延续价值
* 对于随机扩散过程(伊藤过程),HJB 方程变为:ρV(x) = max_a{r(x,a) + L^a V(x)},其中 L^a 是包含漂移和扩散项的无穷小生成元
* 连续时间策略迭代在策略评估(求解当前策略下的价值)和策略改进(通过Q函数贪婪选择动作)之间交替进行
* 该方法基于模型,需要已知动态 f(x,a) 和 Σ(x,a),使用神经网络表示价值函数和策略
* 计算生成元 L^a V 需要价值函数的一阶和二阶导数,通过自动微分获得

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://dani2442.github.io/posts/continuous-rl/)**

### Voyager 1 runs on 69 KB of memory and an 8-track tape recorder

* This article likely explores the remarkably minimal computing resources aboard NASA's Voyager 1 spacecraft, launched in 1977. It probably details how the probe operates with just 69 kilobytes of memory (less than a basic text file today) and uses an 8-track tape recorder for data storage—technology that was already becoming obsolete when the mission launched.
* Why it might be interesting: It's a fascinating look at engineering constraints and ingenuity. Despite having computational power thousands of times less than a modern smartphone, Voyager 1 continues to function 47+ years later, billions of miles from Earth in interstellar space. This serves as a powerful reminder that clever engineering and robust design can sometimes matter more than raw computing power, and offers perspective on how far technology has advanced while highlighting the timeless principles of good system design.

---

### 旅行者一号仅靠 69 KB 内存和 8 轨磁带录音机运行

* 这篇文章可能探讨了 NASA 旅行者一号探测器上极其有限的计算资源。该探测器于 1977 年发射，文章很可能详细介绍了它如何仅用 69 KB 的内存（比今天一个基本文本文件还小）运行，并使用 8 轨磁带录音机存储数据——这项技术在任务发射时就已经开始过时了。
* 为何值得关注：这是一次关于工程限制与创造力的精彩探索。尽管计算能力比现代智能手机低数千倍，旅行者一号在距离地球数十亿英里的星际空间中已持续运行 47 年以上。这有力地提醒我们，巧妙的工程设计和稳健的系统架构有时比强大的计算能力更重要，同时也让我们看到技术进步的巨大跨越，以及优秀系统设计的永恒价值。

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://techfixated.com/a-1977-time-capsule-voyager-1-runs-on-69-kb-of-memory-and-an-8-track-tape-recorder-4/)**
